title: Flameless Floating Candles with Magic Wand, Christmas Candles Decoration, 10Pcs Flickering Warm Light LED Taper Candles Battery Operated with Timer for New Year Party Wedding Window Decor
features: 【MAGICAL EXPERIENCE WITH FLOATING EFFECT CANDLES】Simply wave the MAGIC WAND — all hanging candles will turn on/off, adjust their brightness, bringing an unprecedented sense of wonder and romance to your space
【REALISTIC FLICKERING EFFECT】Advanced warm flickering light technology delivers a genuine candlelight experience, creating a dreamlike and cozy ambiance without the fire risks or wax mess
【DECORATE MANY SCENES】Perfect for Halloween, Christmas, New Year, Weddings, Birthdays, Party, Romantic dinner, or Festive Celebration. Bestowing venues with sophistication and magic

【CORDLESS & BATTERY POWERED】Each led candle light is powered by a simple AAA battery, making it easy to replace and ensuring your magical ambiance never fades. No messy wires or outlets required! (Battery not included)
【TIMER FUNCTION】Our taper candles feature a convenient 6-hour loop timer. Set it and forget it, as the candles will automatically turn off and on to your schedule

【PACKAGE CONTENTS】 Includes 10 pc LED candles lights and a magic wand remote and a roll of line. You can hang these realistic candles on ceilings, windows, door, mantelpieces, christmas tree or anywhere else you desire gentle candlelight effects
description: Product Description The Candles at a Glance: Quantity: 10PCS -----Lighting Modes: Steady on / Flicker Candles Color: White Candle -----Light Color: Warm white Material: ABS -----Height of candle : 15cm-----Battery Operated: 1 x AAA battery (Not Included)
